title: `Azzuwr #5809
definition:
Azur or Azzur = "he that assists"

 1) a Benjamite of Gibeon, father of the false prophet Hananiah
 2) father of Jaazaniah, one of the princes against whom Ezekiel was
    commanded to prophecy
